programs.title: Fixer Upper
programs.desc: Touring three homes in Woodway, Texas, to find a move-in ready place in the city's reputable school district.

programs.title: Fixer Upper
programs.desc: A couple tours three houses in Waco, Texas, and although their wishlist is small, so is their budget.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Vacation Renovation in Ocean Park Washington
programs.desc: A couple living in Seattle searches for a vacation getaway along the sands of Ocean Park, Wash, and waterfront homes in this Pacific coast community aren't cheap, so finding a deal could require some renovations.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Biloxi Beach House Renovation for Vacation
programs.desc: A Dallas couple is looking for a vacation home that's only a short walk to the beaches of Biloxi, Miss.; they are on a budget and willing to put in the work to renovate a house into a place where they can eventually retire.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: A Beach Home Blowout Renovation on Pawleys Island, SC
programs.desc: A Carolina family finds a deal on their new beach house on Pawleys Island, S.C.; a massive overhaul of the floor plan and expansions on both floors guarantees room for their growing family.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Making a Splash on the Brunswick Islands
programs.desc: A beach-loving family from Raleigh, N.C., looks for their own slice of waterfront heaven on the coast; after a lifetime of working hard, they finally get the chance to make their dreams come true.
